author: @KetteDerWelten

text:
Maro and Luigi have to toast Da Princess, and an anonymous source already has instructions laid out on how to do such a thing. Finishing this note reveals another, provided by the deceased Bowser, which is supposed to tell how to find Da Princess. This turns out to be useless, since The Uctions from Weegee is required. Reading this final piece of paper gives us Bowser's decapitated head and left claw at long last, which FINALLY lets Mario and Luigi know Da Princess' location.

This shit is deep!
